title: NitroFeather
description: The Utility + Optimization Modpack you've been waiting for
body:
NitroFeather is a Quality-of-Life and Optimization modpack. The main goal of NitroFeather is to provide the best performance and utilities without modifying vanilla mechanics or functionality.

Here are some of NitroFeather's features:

- Optimization (Multiple Mods)
  
- In-game skin management ([Skin Shuffle](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinshuffle))
  
- In-game content installation ([Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify))
  
- Multiplayer World Hosting ([World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host/version/0.5.1+1.21.4-fabric))
  
- Shaderpack Support ([Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris))
  
- Extra resource pack features ([EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone), [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui), [Patched](https://modrinth.com/mod/patched), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity))
  
- Dynamic Lights ([LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/4.0.1+1.21.4))
  
- Zoom ([Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify/version/2.14.2+1.21.3))
  
- Controller support ([Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify/))

- Simpler F3 Menu ([Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3))

**For a full list of mods and resource packs, look at each version's download page respectively.**
